title: vicia pinetorum
intro: Vicia pinetorum, also known as Pine Vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Pine Vetch include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Pine Vetch can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
